title: CoordsCoordsCoords
description: Coordinates and Biome on your HUD hotbar
body:
CoordsCoordsCoords datapack lets you display your coordinates and current Biome on the in-game HUD.
![CoordsCoordsCoords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aae33ed648c10008a3c119665e276819b780ed7f.png)
![CoordsCoordsCoords mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b743b83ddb7dcea084b1eddc849fe85924412b9.png)
![CoordsCoordsCoords datapack coordinates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bec682f78fd9943d6727411a70a9d3170d4112c6.png)
_____

![CoordsCoordsCoords coordinates on Minecraft HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2576187f7eea640efc2a999bdae8ff04f1903b_0.webp)
- Optionally, you may enable "minimal" mode that'll _only_ display your Minecraft coordinates without ever having to press F3.
![CoordsCoordsCoords coordinates hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8518e5bf706a9e63496cfc7147a43f154ac0352.png)

- Restore settings to the default with "/function coordscoordscoords:enable_defaults"
![CoordsCoordsCoords fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f84a913e89ecf03a531cef0675cb95439cd45eb.png)

_____

### ⌨ INSTALLATION

- Install the CoordsCoordsCoords datapack by locating your worlds' save, creating a "datapacks" folder, and drag & drop CoordsCoordsCoords.zip
![CoordsCoordsCoords install](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90cad4eb83c23dc47ef35059232c50ac41bfa196.png)
- Uninstall CoordsCoordsCoords by running the command "/function coordscoordscoords:uninstall"
![CoordsCoordsCoords remove uninstall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93bf649a3c63f5e91ca64cbbe48b8aa87f034680.png)
